name: painel-contratos-iguape-sp
description: Painel estático de contratos da Prefeitura Municipal de Iguape/SP.

scripts.lint: eslint . && prettier --check . && stylelint "src/css/**/*.css" && htmlhint index.html offline.html && markdownlint "**/*.md" --ignore node_modules --ignore coverage --ignore playwright-report
scripts.lint:fix: eslint . --fix && prettier --write . && stylelint "src/css/**/*.css" --fix && markdownlint "**/*.md" --ignore node_modules --ignore coverage --ignore playwright-report --fix
